name: Garlic Basil Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Spicy Globe or lemon basil (tightly packed)
1/4 teaspoon Dry mustard or Dijon-style mustard
1 tablespoon Lemon juice or cider vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the olive oil in a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
2. Puree for 1 minute.
3. Slowly add the olive oil while the machine is still running, stopping as soon as all the oil has been incorporated and the mixture has emulsified. Do not overblend.
4. For added stability, blend in a tablespoon of hot water into the finished mayonnaise.
"The Herb Companion" suggests using this spread with meats, grilled chicken, vegetables, sandwiches, and salads.
